title: Charthāwal Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Charthāwal with a Z-Score of +3.66. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Charthāwal is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 11.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 21%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is at 11.5 km/h. 
 These conditions are leading to a critical situation, with no heating degree days (HDD) and a significant cooling degree days (CDD) impact.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
